texto: I have good and bad days like everyone else. I just try to be positive and surround myself with great people. When I think about all the great things and people I have had in my life, that gives me confidence.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jessica White: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “I have good and bad days like everyone else. I just try to be positive and surround myself with g…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, vida, positive pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de positive e great.
